rationale: RunArgs struct declared in types.go with the expected flat field set; runInternal added as a private dispatch seam routing through existing Run; five new tests cover dispatch, error paths, and field threading. Worker result.json reports build+tests green.

findings.summary: runInternal lives in a new run_internal.go rather than runner.go as the description suggested; same package so no functional impact.
Title mentions an 'AgentRunner signature' but no AgentRunner interface is introduced — acceptance criteria do not require one, so non-blocking.
Pre-commit hooks bypassed per commit message due to a base-rev codex integration test failure unrelated to this bead; worth confirming on next bead.
